Configuration file for the nrf52 target in the NimBLE project, specifying dependencies.

# Purpose
This metadata file defines a package configuration for a software component. The `pkg.name` specifies the package's identifier as `targets/nrf52`, indicating it is related to the NRF52 target platform. The `pkg.type` is set to `target`, classifying the package as a target-specific component. The file includes placeholders for `pkg.description`, `pkg.author`, and `pkg.homepage`, which are intended to provide additional information about the package but are currently empty. The `pkg.deps` section lists dependencies required by the package, specifically the `@apache-mynewt-nimble/nimble/controller`, which is a component of the Apache Mynewt NimBLE Bluetooth stack.
